creator: s.bilberry@gmail.com
text:
ntpd is crashing right after it is starting up. The configuration file is the following:
server         ntp.tuxfamily.net
server         time.flygplats.net
server          a.ntp.alphazed.net
server          ntp.cis.strath.ac.uk
server          ru.pool.ntp.org
server          ntp2.belbone.be
driftfile       /var/db/ntp.drift
keys /etc/ntp.keys
trustedkey 1
requestkey 1
controlkey 1

There is also ntpd.truss (attached) - a truss output for "truss ntpd -n
-A -g" and ntpd.core.gz (80Kb).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: It is 100% repeated only on this host (on another 7.0-R-p1 it works
flawlessly with the same config file). No other daemon on this host is
noticed crashing.

The problematic host hardware spec:
AMD Athlon XP 1700+, 512Mb DDR, VIA KT600, Realtek 8139 NIC
